compiled_state.title: Full behavior/integration/contract coverage across all 3 interfaces (MCP, CLI, lib)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Why
Coverage across the three facades (MCP, CLI, library) is uneven after the migration. Every behavior, integration, and contract (internal AND external — incl. the Jira reconciler contract and the MCP output schemas) should be covered through all three interfaces where applicable.

## What
- Map behaviors/integrations/contracts × {MCP, CLI, lib}; find the gaps.
- Add tests to close gaps: parity across interfaces, external contracts (Jira reconciler field round-trips, MCP outputSchemas), internal contracts (optimistic-concurrency exit 10, lock discipline, replay determinism).
- Includes the roam-crone-disco follow-up (sign/verify-signature output schemas) if not already done.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Behavior×interface coverage matrix documented; gaps enumerated then closed
- [ ] External contracts covered: Jira reconciler bidirectional field round-trips; MCP outputSchema validation for every advertised command
- [ ] Internal contracts covered through CLI + lib + MCP: exit-10 concurrency, lock discipline, deterministic replay
- [ ] Coverage measured (coverage.py) with a recorded target; suite green locally + CI

comments.body: DONE. Closed 3-interface coverage gaps via gap analysis (G1/G2/G3/G5/G6); G4 link-sync deferred to story 25ae-92e6-2927-49b6 (unimplemented capability, linked discovered_from). External contracts: MCP sign_manifest/verify_signature now typed -> advertise canonical schemas + TOTAL-partition completeness guard (every advertised tool classified); 7 Jira bidirectional field round-trips (description ADF, blocked/cancelled status-label, label, parent, comment echo) chaining the real pure differs + a gated non-destructive live reconcile dry-run smoke (verified live, 38s). Internal contracts: MCP transition/claim/reopen concurrency-error-identity tests + lib reopen ConcurrencyError. Coverage: 61% in-process baseline recorded (docs/coverage.md w/ subprocess caveat) + conservative fail_under=50; behavior x interface matrix documented in docs/coverage.md. Strengthened tautological deps-parity assertion. Suite green (broad 1759 + integration 15); ruff clean. Two opus implementers + two opus reviewers (both APPROVE); independently verified suite+ruff+live bridge-probe. Commit bdcbbd26.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
